login.title: Sign in
login.demoNote: Role is auto-derived from each employee's grade and designation.
login.tagline: AI-powered early warning for insider fraud — explainable in plain English.

admin.title: PRISM Operations Centre
admin.subtitle: Live insider-fraud surveillance — alerts fire only when both layers agree.

manager.title: Branch Investigation Queue
manager.subtitle: Alerts scoped to your branch. You can dismiss, escalate, or recommend account freeze.

employee.subtitle: PRISM keeps a transparent record of every system action attributed to you. This page is your view of that record.
employee.recordedBullets:
• Logins, devices and IP addresses for the last 30 days
• Customer accounts you viewed and transactions you initiated
• Approvals you granted and any override actions
• Voluntary disclosures of external accounts you submit
employee.activitySubtitle: Full transparency over what PRISM records about you.

feed.empty: No alerts yet — run npm run seed-alerts to populate the demo feed.

whatIf.title: What-If Simulator
whatIf.subtitle: Pose a hypothetical action and see the risk score it would produce — useful for calibrating thresholds and tabletop exercises.
whatIf.inputsSubtitle: Pose a hypothetical action — no alert is persisted.
whatIf.resultSubtitle: Mock detector. Drop in real ML by setting DETECTOR=fastapi in .env.
whatIf.placeholder: Enter inputs and click Run simulation.

graph.title: Relationship & beneficiary network
graph.subtitle: Graph view used by Layer 1 — dependents, employee accounts, managed customers and the counterparty accounts they transact with.

disclosure.title: Voluntary Disclosure
disclosure.subtitle: As suggested by Ms. A. Manimekhalai — proactively disclose any external bank accounts you hold or operate. This reduces the chance of a false-positive flag against you later.

operations.title: Operations Console
operations.subtitleEmployee: Perform real banking actions. Suspicious behaviour is flagged in real time and pushed to admin dashboards.
operations.subtitleManager: Branch-manager operations. Higher-privilege actions (FD break, approval override, config change) are scored more strictly.
operations.placeholder: Pick an action above, fill in the fields, then execute. The result panel shows whether PRISM flagged the action.
operations.resultSubtitle: Activity log + transaction are written to MongoDB; alerts stream via SSE.
operations.flagged: Action flagged as suspicious — PRISM alert created and pushed live.
operations.clean: Action completed without flagging — PRISM saw no anomaly.

fields.narrationPlaceholder: e.g. FD closure on customer request

TRANSACTION_INITIATE.label: Initiate transaction
TRANSACTION_INITIATE.hint: Debit a customer account. Off-hours / dormant / over-limit auto-flag.

ACCOUNT_VIEW.label: View account
ACCOUNT_VIEW.hint: Pull up a customer account. Dormant / cross-branch / off-hours auto-flag.

BULK_DATA_EXPORT.label: Bulk data export
BULK_DATA_EXPORT.hint: Export customer records to a file (>100 rows flagged).

FD_BREAK.label: Break Fixed Deposit
FD_BREAK.hint: Premature FD closure — the FD-fraud Manimekhalai scenario.

OVERRIDE_LIMIT.label: Override approval limit
OVERRIDE_LIMIT.hint: Approve a transaction above the standard authority.

CONFIG_CHANGE.label: Change configuration
CONFIG_CHANGE.hint: System config touch — always reviewed by an analyst.

operations.submittedDesc: has been logged and is being monitored.
operations.monitoringActive: Fraud monitoring is active. Any anomalies will be escalated to the admin dashboard automatically.
